network_boundary: Management endpoints require the same exact Host, optional exact Origin and forwarded-header rejection as /mcp. They are public only on the loopback-only listener and grant no MCP authority.

draining.admitted_requests: finish normally within the bounded drain window
draining.after_timeout: drop the server future and stop the operational lifecycle

cancellation: MCP cancellation is advisory. It cannot roll back an accepted commit; exact same-authority idempotent retry recovers a committed response after ambiguous delivery.
determinism: Lifecycle state, counters, signals, operational time and management requests never enter battle state, replay facts, RNG or canonical hashes.
